name: Tec-9 | 蓝钛
collection: 军火交易 2 号收藏品
collectionZh: 军火交易 2 号收藏品
descriptionEn: An ideal pistol for the Terrorist on the move, the Tec-9 is lethal in close quarters and features a high magazine capacity. It has a titanium parts whose blue color is characteristic of an oxide layer achieved via controlled anodization at 30 volts.
descriptionZh: 一把T进行机动作战的理想手枪，Tec-9 可以在近距离造成致命伤害，且弹匣容量较高。 这把武器拥有钛部件，上面的蓝钛具有氧化层的特性，通过控制在 30 伏下的阳极化处理得以实现。
